title: New load balancer expert skills are live
summary: Update your linux-admin plugin to get the new load-balancer router and specialist skills for HAProxy, NGINX proxy, F5, LVS/IPVS, keepalived, DNS/GSLB, and cloud load balancers.
highlights: New /linux-admin:load-balancer-expert router recommends the best load balancer for your request.
Added specialist skills for NGINX proxy, F5, LVS/IPVS, keepalived, DNS/GSLB, and cloud load balancers.
Plugin package metadata is aligned to 1.17.17 with 106 expert skills.
